prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Neighbor Who Babysat Too Much
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Lifetime Original
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: Silence is just fear wearing cashmere.
Omen: a lake bell ringing without wind
Relationship dynamic: career vs family guilt
Props: casserole dish, scarf with impossible timing, ceramic owl

Cast:
- Gavin Pike | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=lawyer | threat_aura=0.44 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=once left town without explaining why; has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Derek Vale | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=regional dentist | threat_aura=0.63 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=has a storage unit he refuses to explain; moved money during a family emergency
- Luke Marlowe | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=salon owner | threat_aura=0.54 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=once hid a casserole dish containing evidence; knows about a half sibling no one asked for
- Elias Winterson | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=therapist | threat_aura=0.58 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=knows why the old orchard chapel was closed; had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Jenna Pruitt | archetype=decorative_husband | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=attorney with no visible clients | threat_aura=0.68 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=moved money during a family emergency; has a storage unit he refuses to explain
- Gavin Vale | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=local podcaster | threat_aura=0.53 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Sienna Pike | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Cole Vale | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Derek Vale is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Gavin Pike says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Winter Hollow.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Derek?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Sienna. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Gavin. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The casserole dish is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Elias."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
